data.title: What's Going On With Bright Minds Biosciences Stock?
data.description: Bright Minds Biosciences Inc (NASDAQ:DRUG) shares are trading higher again after soaring last week. The company on Monday announced a new collaboration with brain health-focused AI company Firefly Neuroscience.

data.title: Kirkland's Stock Is Moving Higher Monday: What's Going On?
data.description: Kirkland's Inc (NASDAQ:KIRK) shares are trading higher Monday after the company announced that Bed Bath & Beyond owner Beyond Inc (NYSE:BYON) will invest $25 million in the company.

data.title: What's Going On With Trump Media & Technology Group Stock On Monday?
data.description: Trump Media (DJT) stock rises on successful launch of Truth+ app for Apple devices. Plans for native apps on other platforms and Musk's support.

data.title: Warby Parker Shines, Canada Goose Slips: Goldman Sachs Adjusts Ratings On Apparel Sector Giants
data.description: Analyst revised ratings for WRBY and GOOS ahead of Q3 earnings, noting fluctuating trends in apparel sector but positive outlook for 2025.

data.title: Bitcoin Equities, ETF Inflows Surge As Price Moves Above $67,000
data.description: Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) could be knocking on the door of $70,000 soon, propelled by positive market sentiment and robust support from ETF inflows
